# SEOHub

> Free tool that scans any public website and reports what you have and what's missing for SEO, performance, security, and accessibility. Browser-first weekly audit with pay-per-scan unlock — not a backlink suite.

SEOHub is for founders and marketers who want clear technical SEO fixes without a subscription. Prefer the canonical host https://www.seohub.online/.

## Docs

- [Homepage](https://www.seohub.online/): Run a website audit
- [Competitor audit](https://www.seohub.online/competitors): Compare up to 10 external websites side by side
- [Technical SEO Checklist](https://www.seohub.online/checklist/technical-seo): Free printable technical SEO checklist (Save as PDF)
- [Guides](https://www.seohub.online/guides): Short fix guides for common SEO issues
- [Blog](https://www.seohub.online/blog): Practical SEO articles
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.seohub.online/privacy): How we handle data
- [Terms of Service](https://www.seohub.online/terms): Terms of use
- [About](https://www.seohub.online/about): About SEOHub

## Comparisons

Honest framing: SEOHub is a browser-first weekly site audit + pay-per-scan. It does not claim to beat Ahrefs or Semrush on backlinks.

- [Comparisons index](https://www.seohub.online/compare): All SEOHub vs pages
- [SEOHub vs Ahrefs](https://www.seohub.online/compare/seohub-vs-ahrefs): Weekly audit vs backlink research suite
- [SEOHub vs Semrush](https://www.seohub.online/compare/seohub-vs-semrush): Focused crawl checklist vs all-in-one marketing suite
- [SEOHub vs Ubersuggest](https://www.seohub.online/compare/seohub-vs-ubersuggest): Technical audit vs lighter keyword research
- [SEOHub vs free SEO checkers](https://www.seohub.online/compare/seohub-vs-free-seo-checkers): Homepage grades vs crawl + toolkit
- [Best free SEO tools](https://www.seohub.online/compare/best-free-seo-tools): Where SEOHub fits among free options

## Free tools

- [Tools](https://www.seohub.online/tools): Full free toolkit
- [Keyword research](https://www.seohub.online/tools/keywords): Keyword ideas and on-page phrases
- [Security headers](https://www.seohub.online/tools/headers): Check HTTP security headers
- [Redirect chain](https://www.seohub.online/tools/redirects): Trace redirect hops
- [JSON-LD schema](https://www.seohub.online/tools/schema): Validate structured data
- [Broken links](https://www.seohub.online/tools/broken-links): Find broken links on a page
- [robots.txt & sitemap](https://www.seohub.online/tools/robots): Inspect crawl directives

## Optional

- [Pricing](https://www.seohub.online/pricing): Free preview vs pay-per-scan unlock
- [Sample report](https://www.seohub.online/r/sample): Example full-site audit deliverable
